## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (bug fixes: regression test; features: core + edge cases)
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] `swift build -c debug` passes
- [ ] `swift test --enable-code-coverage` passes
- [ ] `swiftlint lint` passes with no new warnings
- [ ] PR title follows gitmoji format (`emoji type: summary`) — it becomes the squash-merge commit on `main`
